title: kitchen-sink example upkeep
manager: Keep the "kitchen sink" machine — the deliberately maximal FSL document that uses every language feature — current with the language, because the dragon fuzzing suite generates and mutates from it. If the kitchen sink rots, the adversarial tester loses its richest seed and starts fuzzing a stale subset of the grammar. This is phase-A groundwork for waking the dragon before 6.0 ships.
cs: seed corpus for `kitchen_sink_dragon.maximal.ts`; upkeep means every grammar feature stays represented so the splitmix-seeded generators cover the real surface, not a 2020 snapshot of it.
